title: Database Normalization
description: Organizing database tables to reduce redundancy and improve data integrity. Normal forms: 1NF, 2NF, 3NF, BCNF.

title: Database Indexing Strategies
description: Creating efficient indexes to speed up query execution. Includes B-tree, hash, composite, partial, and covering indexes.
best_practices: Index columns used in WHERE, JOIN, ORDER BY
Use composite indexes for multi-column queries
Monitor index usage and remove unused indexes
Consider covering indexes for frequent queries

title: Database Replication
description: Maintaining copies of data across multiple database instances for high availability and read scalability. Types: synchronous, asynchronous, semi-synchronous.
best_practices: Use async replication for read replicas
Use sync replication for critical data

title: Database Sharding
description: Horizontally partitioning data across multiple database instances. Each shard holds a subset of data, enabling horizontal scaling.
anti_patterns: Poor shard key selection causing hotspots

title: CAP Theorem
description: States that distributed systems can only guarantee two of three: Consistency, Availability, Partition tolerance. Guides database technology selection.
best_practices: Understand trade-offs for your use case

title: Database Caching Patterns
description: Using in-memory caches (Redis, Memcached) to reduce database load. Patterns: cache-aside, read-through, write-through, write-behind.

title: NoSQL Database Selection
description: Choosing the right NoSQL database type: Document (MongoDB), Key-Value (Redis), Column-Family (Cassandra), Graph (Neo4j) based on data model and access patterns.
best_practices: Match database type to data model
anti_patterns: Using NoSQL for highly relational data

title: Database Migration Strategies
description: Managing schema changes safely in production. Approaches include versioned migrations, blue-green database deployments, and expand-contract pattern.

title: Connection Pooling
description: Maintaining a pool of reusable database connections to reduce connection overhead. Critical for high-throughput applications.
best_practices: Configure pool size based on workload
Use connection pool per service instance

title: Data Modeling Best Practices
description: Designing database schemas that accurately represent business entities while optimizing for application query patterns and performance requirements.
